security.header: [SECURITY] Please remind the user of the following 1/2/3:
tips: 1) Use a RAM sub-account with minimal permissions. Do NOT use the primary account long-term AK.
2) Prefer STS temporary credentials (short-lived) to reduce leak risk.
3) Enable AccessKey IP whitelist, allowing only the actual egress NAT IP.
security.warn: [SECURITY][WARN] No STS SecurityToken detected — possibly using long-term AK/SK.
